episode_theme: Arrival and first night - seven strangers trapped in sentient house

beats.beat: Eleanor and Marcus see the house
beats.description: Eleanor and Marcus's car pulls up to towering iron gates. Through the fog, Blackwood Estate looms - a Victorian monstrosity of turrets and broken windows.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Eleanor seeks confirmation this is the address from the cryptic invitation
beats.conflict: The gates are locked, and no one responds to the intercom
beats.turn: The gates swing open on their own with a metallic shriek
beats.ghost_logic: The house opened the gates without any visible mechanism or human intervention
beats.narrative_tension: Entering means accepting the house's invitation - there may be no turning back

beats.description: Marcus drives slowly up the winding gravel driveway. The house seems to loom larger with each turn, its windows like watching eyes.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Marcus wants to maintain professional composure despite growing unease
beats.conflict: The driveway keeps extending, the house never seeming to get closer
beats.turn: They round a final bend and the house suddenly fills the entire windshield
beats.ghost_logic: Spatial distortion - the driveway was impossibly long, then abruptly short
beats.narrative_tension: Their sense of physical reality is already being manipulated

beats.description: Eleanor and Marcus step out. The house towers above them, Gothic architecture twisted into something wrong. The front door is massive oak, slightly ajar.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Eleanor wants to document this moment - she takes out her phone
beats.conflict: Her phone shows no signal and the camera won't focus on the house
beats.turn: The phone dies completely, battery draining from 80% to zero
beats.ghost_logic: Technology fails in proximity to the house - it rejects outside documentation
beats.narrative_tension: No way to call for help or record evidence of what happens next

beats.description: They walk toward the entrance. The door creaks wider with each step, as if beckoning. Wind carries the smell of old wood, roses, and something sour underneath.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Marcus wants to ring the bell or knock - maintain civilized protocol
beats.conflict: There is no doorbell, and the door is already open - knocking feels absurd
beats.turn: A voice from inside calls 'Come in, we've been expecting you' - but they see no one
beats.ghost_logic: Disembodied voice that knows they are there
beats.narrative_tension: Someone - or something - is orchestrating their arrival

shots.description: Tracking dolly glides toward towering iron gates through rain-soaked grounds, headlights cutting fog as Victorian mansion looms ahead
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Handheld sways with Eleanor and Marcus as they approach, fog swirling around car doors, house watching through broken windows
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Lens locks on ancient gate mechanism as metal shrieks open autonomously, no hand touching the lever
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Car headlights illuminate gravel path while thunder rolls across turrets above
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide dolly: Winding driveway stretches impossibly long, house never growing closer through windshield
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium handheld: Marcus grips steering wheel tighter as driveway extends, Eleanor's breath fogs glass
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close push: Dashboard compass spins wildly, impossible motion beneath steady hands
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Rearview mirror shows gates already vanished into fog behind them
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide crane down: They step from car, house suddenly towers above, filling frame completely
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium track: Eleanor and Marcus move toward entrance, shadows shifting in upper windows
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close study: Eleanor's EMF detector surges to red without her touching it
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Front door creaks wider on its own, candlelight flickering within
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide steadicam: They cross threshold, door groaning closed behind them of its own will
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium circle: Both turn as door slams shut, handle melting into seamless wood
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close rack focus: Door to empty wall, no knob remains, no escape
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Eleanor's hand presses wall where door stood, solid Victorian wallpaper, no seam
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

scenes.scene_purpose: Full cast intro, first manifestation, house's awareness revealed

beats.description: Eleanor and Marcus enter to find three other guests already present - Victoria (elegant older woman), Father Rhys (priest in civilian clothes), and Kenji (tech entrepreneur). All hold identical cream envelopes.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Victoria wants to understand why they've been summoned
beats.conflict: No one knows who sent the invitations or why they were chosen
beats.turn: Father Rhys reveals his invitation was addressed to his dead sister
beats.ghost_logic: The house sent invitations to dead people, then redirected them to living relatives
beats.narrative_tension: Each person may have been chosen because of a dead connection to the house

beats.description: The guests compare their letters. Identical handwriting, cream paper, red wax seals. Each promised something different: money, answers, absolution, closure.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Kenji wants to find the host and demand an explanation
beats.conflict: There are no servants, no host, no other people in the house
beats.turn: They realize all the invitations were signed 'E.B.' - Eleanor Blackwood, who died in 1893
beats.ghost_logic: The house itself sent the invitations using the name of its original owner
beats.narrative_tension: They are guests of a dead woman in a house that acts with purpose

beats.description: A grandfather clock in the corner chimes seven times. On the seventh chime, all the lights go out. In the darkness, they hear footsteps descending the grand staircase.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Marcus wants to find the breaker box and restore the lights
beats.conflict: In the darkness, no one can find their way - the layout seems to have changed
beats.turn: The lights come back on. Standing on the stairs is a pale woman in Victorian dress - then she's gone
beats.ghost_logic: Apparition of Eleanor Blackwood, visible for only a moment
beats.narrative_tension: The house can manipulate light, space, and manifests its former inhabitant

beats.description: Panicked, several guests rush to the front door. It's locked from the inside with no keyhole. The windows are sealed shut, painted over from the outside.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Kenji wants to break a window to escape
beats.conflict: The glass is impossibly thick - he tries a chair, it bounces off
beats.turn: A portrait above the mantle turns its painted eyes toward them
beats.ghost_logic: The house has sealed itself - they are prisoners, watched by painted eyes
beats.narrative_tension: No escape is possible, and the house is aware of every action

beats.description: The guests regroup in the center of the foyer. Victoria suggests they stay together, search for another exit. Father Rhys begins a quiet prayer.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Eleanor wants to understand why she specifically was invited
beats.conflict: A voice whispers her name from three different hallways simultaneously
beats.turn: The chandelier above them sways, crystals chiming - spelling out in Morse code: 'UPSTAIRS'
beats.ghost_logic: The house is directing them, communicating through objects
beats.narrative_tension: They must choose between obeying the house or resisting its will

shots.description: Slow dolly into candlelit foyer as five silhouettes gather, first figure slips into frame by four seconds
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Camera circles assembled guests, fear reflected in polished floorboards, shadows deeper than candlelight allows
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Macro study: Five identical cream envelopes, edges yellowed with age, postmarked 1893
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide reveal: Eleanor opens envelope, others lean in, all holding same impossible summons
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium push: Guests compare letters, identical handwriting addresses them by dead ancestors' names
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close on Father Rhys: His envelope addressed to his sister, dead three years
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Letter paper crumbles to ash in his hands, words vanishing as he reads
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide locked: All letters crumble simultaneously, ash falling like black snow
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium handheld: Guests freeze as grandfather clock chimes seven, impossibly loud
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close tilt up: Clock face shows 7:00, but shadows fall wrong for evening
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: On seventh chime, all candles extinguish at once, total darkness
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide night vision: Silhouettes motionless in black, breathing synchronized against will
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium chaos: Lights snap back on, guests stampede toward front door
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close desperation: Hands pound seamless wall where entrance stood moments before
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Victorian wallpaper perfect and aged, no door ever existed here
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide descent: All lights extinguish again, chandelier crashes in darkness
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium terror: Lights return, pale woman in Victorian dress stands on stairs
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close on apparition: Eleanor Blackwood's portrait-perfect face, eyes tracking each guest
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: Single blink, woman vanishes, only candlesmoke remains
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide aftermath: Five guests huddle in center, all doors and windows sealed behind wallpaper
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

scenes.scene_purpose: Separate characters, establish isolation, rooms have histories

beats.description: Upstairs, they find five bedroom doors, each with a brass nameplate. But the names aren't theirs - they're names from 1893, the year Eleanor Blackwood died.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Victoria wants to find logic in the name assignments
beats.conflict: Each modern guest's name shares initials with a nameplate (Eleanor/Elizabeth, Marcus/Martin, etc.)
beats.turn: Behind each door, they hear sounds - breathing, humming, crying
beats.ghost_logic: The rooms are occupied by the spirits of previous guests from 1893
beats.narrative_tension: They must decide whether to enter rooms prepared for their doppelgängers

beats.description: The hallway lights begin to flicker. One by one, bedroom doors swing open. A force like invisible hands begins pushing each guest toward their assigned room.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: The group wants to stay together in the hallway
beats.conflict: The house exerts physical force, pushing them apart
beats.turn: Eleanor is shoved into 'Elizabeth's Room' and the door slams shut, locking from outside
beats.ghost_logic: The house has physical power to move people and lock doors
beats.narrative_tension: Isolation is being forced upon them - the group's safety in numbers is broken

beats.description: Alone in Elizabeth's Room, Eleanor finds it's a perfect Victorian bedroom - but frozen in time. A diary on the nightstand, dated October 1893. Clothes laid out on the bed in her size.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Eleanor wants to find another way out - a window, a connecting door
beats.conflict: The window shows not the outside, but a reflection of the room behind her - she sees herself from behind
beats.turn: She turns around. There is no one there. Turns back to window - her reflection is now facing her, but moving independently
beats.ghost_logic: Mirrors and reflections show alternate realities or parallel inhabitants
beats.narrative_tension: She cannot trust her senses - the room is playing with perception

beats.description: Eleanor opens Elizabeth's diary to the last entry: 'October 31, 1893 - She promised us answers. We should never have come upstairs. The rooms remember. The rooms hunger. If you're reading this, you're already—' The entry ends mid-sentence.
beats.visual: Cinematic horror composition with motivated lighting
beats.goal: Eleanor wants to understand what happened to Elizabeth
beats.conflict: The dates in the diary match exactly - October 31, 1893 was a Tuesday, same day of week as today
beats.turn: Fresh ink appears on the blank next page: 'Welcome back, Elizabeth. You're home now.'
beats.ghost_logic: The house is writing in the diary in real-time, addressing Eleanor as Elizabeth
beats.narrative_tension: The house believes they are the reincarnations of the 1893 guests - or wants to make them into those people

shots.description: Steadicam drifts down corridor as brass nameplates emerge from shadow: Elizabeth, Martin, Victoria...
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Handheld sways with Eleanor as recognition dawns - her nameplate reads 'Elizabeth Blackwood 1893'
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Slow push into brass nameplate as breathing sounds seep from behind locked door
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide locked: Hallway lights flicker, bedroom doors swing open one by one of their own will
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium track: Guests peer into rooms, each perfectly preserved from 1893, beds still warm
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close study: Indentations in pillows as if heads just lifted, but rooms empty for decades
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Wide crane: Eleanor enters 'Elizabeth's Room' alone, door creaking closed behind her
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium circle: Victorian bedroom perfect as dollhouse, diary open on nightstand
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close push: Diary dated October 31 1893, ink still wet despite century passing
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Insert: 'Tonight we die' written in fresh ink, pages turning on their own
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Medium horror: Eleanor watches as new words write themselves: 'Welcome home, Eleanor'
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze

shots.description: Close extreme: Pen moves across page without hand, spelling her name in Victorian script
shots.lighting: Tungsten-cool split, motivated practicals, atmospheric haze
